Design Requirement Description: RX-Controller Reset & IdleVerify that upon global reset or LTSM RESET state, the RX datapath is cleanly reset, LFSR seeds are initialized, and no valid data is presented to the RDI.
Stimulus Generation: rx_encoding set to RESET/0x00. rmblink_seq_item: idle_ui_cnt randomized, clk_stream/data held at idle states.
Checking: Verify o_rx_done, o_clk_results, o_valid_results remain 0. o_pl_valid on RDI remains low.

Design Requirement Description: Clock Pattern Detection (Pass)Verify that the pattern detector correctly identifies a valid alternating clock sequence (Half-Rate/Quad-Rate) for 16 consecutive windows.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: clk_stream_p and clk_stream_n populated with perfectly alternating 1/0 patterns. pattern_type=CLK_PATTERN.
Checking: Verify o_clk_results transitions to success (1) after exactly 16 consecutive valid 48-bit windows.

Design Requirement Description: Clock Pattern Detection (Error)Verify that injecting noise/errors into the clock stream resets the consecutive window counter and prevents false detection.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: clk_stream_p and n populated with alternating patterns but with random bit-flips injected within the 16 windows.
Checking: Verify o_clk_results remains 0. Counter reset logic must trigger upon error detection.

Design Requirement Description: Valid Pattern DetectionVerify that the pattern detector correctly identifies the Valid pattern utilizing the error threshold provided by LTSM.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: val_stream generated with standard 8'b1111_0000 framing. ltsmc_seq_item: randomize error_threshold.
Checking: Verify o_valid_results transitions to 1 when errors are within error_threshold, and 0 if errors exceed it.

Design Requirement Description: Lane ID Detection (MBINIT)Verify per_lane_id_detector successfully detects logical lane numbers (Bit 0-7 static, 8-15 ID) across all 16 physical lanes.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: data array driven with 16-bit Lane ID patterns mapped to each lane index. val_stream driven high.
Checking: Verify o_rx_data_results bits assert high per lane after 16 consecutive matches.

Design Requirement Description: Lane ID Detection (Error)Verify per_lane_id_detector drops consecutive counter if a Lane ID pattern is corrupted during the MBINIT state.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: Corrupt the 16-bit payload in data on a random subset of lanes before the 16th window.
Checking: Verify o_rx_data_results bit remains 0 for the specifically corrupted lanes.
Coverage: Lane ID failure detection per lane.

Design Requirement Description: LFSR Descrambling (ACTIVE)Verify the RX_LFSR correctly descrambles incoming payload data utilizing modulo 8 logic for lane seeds.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: data payload populated with highly randomized data, scrambled by TB. rx_encoding=ACTIVE.
Checking: Verify rp_rdi_bfm.o_pl_data exactly matches the original unscrambled sequence generated by the testbench.
Coverage: LFSR seeds per lane (0 to 7) exercised.

Design Requirement Description: x16 Lane-to-Byte MappingVerify the L2B block maps the 16 physical lanes directly to the full RDI byte output without degradation.
Stimulus Generation: ltsmc_seq_item: lane_map_code = 011b. rmblink_seq_item: randomized data across all 16 lanes.
Checking: Check scoreboard mapping: Physical Lane N maps to RDI Byte N (N: 0 to 15).

Design Requirement Description: Width Degrade: x8 ModeVerify L2B mapping when the Standard Package degrades to x8 operating mode (Lanes 0-7 or 8-15).
Checking: Check scoreboard mapping: Only active subset of lanes is mapped to the lower bytes of RDI o_pl_data.

Design Requirement Description: Width Degrade: x4 ModeVerify L2B mapping when the Standard Package degrades to x4 operating mode.
Stimulus Generation: ltsmc_seq_item: randomize lane_map_code over valid x4 combinations (e.g., 100b, 101b).
Checking: Check scoreboard mapping: 4 active lanes map sequentially to o_pl_data bytes.

Design Requirement Description: RDI Valid FramingVerify that o_pl_valid on the RDI interface correctly mirrors the descrambled/mapped valid stream from RMBLINK.
Stimulus Generation: rmblink_seq_item: val_stream randomized with inter-packet gaps (e.g., valid drops to 0 periodically).
Checking: Scoreboard verifies that rp_rdi_bfm.o_pl_valid asserts/deasserts precisely in sync with o_pl_data framing.
